ksa_text: Manage data management systems and infrastructure, including data requirements definition, standards implementation, data administration, test data management, database management, and data governance policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-005 (Operational Excellence) scores 0.473 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.473 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Operational content is program management/training, not cloud architecture. Final decision: exclude.
